name: Camera capture + OCR
summary: Turn a USB/built-in webcam into data over camera:// URIs: discover cameras, beep before scan, capture a still frame, describe what is in the photo, find and crop to the dominant object, OCR it, and run simple inspection/alert rules. Capture uses ffmpeg (OpenCV optional); scene understanding + object detection reuse the img2nl engine via urirun-connector-ocr (Pillow edge/stats fallback); OCR uses tesseract, upgrading to the richer OCR connector backends automatically.
description: camera:// is the capture+understand layer on top of usb:// camera discovery. camera://host/devices/query/list lists cameras (product names + /dev/video* nodes via the usb connector). camera://host/photo/command/capture grabs one still frame and can emit a pre-scan beep so a human knows exactly when scanning happens. camera://host/photo/query/describe returns a natural-language description of what is in the photo — scene, dominant colours, detected objects/regions, barcodes — using the img2nl engine when available. camera://host/photo/query/analyze runs the full pipeline: capture (or reuse a given image), describe it, crop to the `target` ('document'/'receipt'/'paragon' tightly crops the sheet via a numpy projection detector, 'object' crops the dominant object, 'auto' picks document-or-object, 'none' skips), optionally deskew=true to perspective-correct a document/receipt shot at an angle (4-point warp; OpenCV corner detection when present, else numpy; Pillow warp), and OCR the crop — returning the photo, description, bbox/corners + crop path, and recognised text. camera://host/photo/query/inspect adds simple rule checks (required/forbidden text, min OCR length, object required, brightness range), returns structured alerts with optional beep_on_alert/fail_on_alert, and persists a verdict (inspection.json sidecar + optional JSONL audit_log) so alerting has a durable trail without a separate log connector. camera://host/photo/query/compare does change/motion detection — compare two files, a reference vs a fresh frame, or two frames captured interval_ms apart — returning a change ratio, a changed flag and the changed region, with optional beep_on_change/fail_on_change to trigger scan-on-motion or stop-on-change flows. camera://host/photo/query/ocr just returns the text. camera://host/receipt/query/parse scans a paragon (or parses given OCR text) into structured JSON: line items (name + price), total, currency, date and NIP. Dependency-light core (ffmpeg + Pillow + tesseract); img2nl/imgl and OpenCV are optional upgrades.
useCases: Capture a webcam frame and OCR it.
Describe what is in a photo — scene, objects, barcodes.
Inspect a scanned item against rules and raise alerts.
Decode barcodes / QR codes and assert an expected code is present.
Scan a receipt/document (paragon) cropped tightly to the sheet before OCR (target=receipt).
Parse a receipt into structured JSON — line items, total, currency, date, NIP.
